name: k6-typescript-boilerplate
description: Reusable k6 boilerplate with first-class TypeScript support.

scripts.test:smoke: rimraf dist .tmp && tsc --noEmit && node ./scripts/build.mjs && node ./scripts/run-k6.mjs dist/tests/smoke.js
scripts.test:api: rimraf dist .tmp && tsc --noEmit && node ./scripts/build.mjs && node ./scripts/run-k6.mjs dist/tests/api.load.js
scripts.test:browser: rimraf dist .tmp && tsc --noEmit && node ./scripts/build.mjs && node ./scripts/run-k6.mjs dist/tests/browser.smoke.js
